title: languas calcarata
intro: Languas calcarata, also known as lengkuas, is a type of rhizome plant native to Southeast Asia, commonly used in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Languas calcarata include reducing inflammation, boosting the immune system, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory tract infections. In herbal preparations, Languas calcarata can be consumed as a decoction, dried and powdered, or used as an essential oil, with the most common preparations being lengkuas tea and lengkuas oil.
